session.user: Run ruff linting on the modified files and report results: ``` ruff check src/erk/cli/commands/pr/submit_pipeline.py tests/unit/cli/commands/pr/submit_pipeline/ ```

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run ruff linting on submit_pipeline files

session.assistant:
ruff check passed: No linting violations found in the modified files.
